# Prodigy Origin

> Free, open-source browser extension mod loader for Prodigy Math Game. Injects a full in-game mod menu — no jailbreak, no account risk, 100% client-side.

## What it does

Prodigy Origin is a browser extension that adds a toggleable mod menu to Prodigy Math Game (play.prodigygame.com). Players press Shift to open the menu and can enable mods across nine categories: player stats, battle mechanics, location/movement, pets, items, utility tools, and beta features.

**Key capabilities:**
- Player mods: set gold, XP, level, member stars, username, grade
- Battle mods: instant kill PvE enemies, set battle hearts, fill energy, PvP health overrides
- Location mods: WASD movement, click-to-teleport, teleport to any map or player's house
- Pet mods: unlock all epics and mythical epics, uncap pet level, add any pet
- Utility: save/load character locally, eval console, pause game
- Beta features: edit pets, morph player, toggle invisibility, switch branches

## Who it's for

Players of Prodigy Math Game (a browser-based educational math RPG for kids) who want to experiment with game mechanics, test features, or explore the game without grinding. Primarily used by the ProdigyPXP modding community.

## Key facts

- Version: 4.2.0
- License: MPL-2.0 (open source)
- Price: Free
- Supported browsers: Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Firefox
- Install: Chrome Web Store (https://extension.prodigyorigin.com)
- Source code: https://github.com/ProdigyPXP/ProdigyOrigin
- Community: Discord (https://dsc.gg/ProdigyPXP)
- All mods are client-side only — no server modification
- Maintained by the ProdigyPXP community

## Important pages

- Homepage / install guide: https://prodigyorigin.com
- Extension listing: https://extension.prodigyorigin.com
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/ProdigyPXP/ProdigyOrigin
- Discord community: https://dsc.gg/ProdigyPXP
- Privacy policy: https://github.com/ProdigyPXP/ProdigyOrigin/blob/master/meta/PRIVACY_POLICY.md
